mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_data (template_id, version, field_values_json, submitter_id, tenant_id, submitted_at) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{version}, #{fieldValuesJson}, #{submitterId}, #{tenantId}, #{submittedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, version, field_values_json, submitter_id, tenant_id, submitted_at FROM form_data WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT id, template_id, version, field_values_json, submitter_id, tenant_id, submitted_at FROM form_data WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC
SELECT id, template_id, version, field_values_json, submitter_id, tenant_id, submitted_at FROM form_data WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC

SELECT id, template_id, version, field_values_json, submitter_id, tenant_id, submitted_at FROM form_data WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND submitter_id = #{submitterId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE form_data SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE form_data SET field_values_json = #{fieldValuesJson} WHERE id = #{id}
